mapper.insert: INSERT INTO JOB_APPLICATION ( APPLY_ID, USER_ID, POSTING_ID, APPLY_TITLE, APPLY_CONTENT, RESUME_FILE, APPLY_STATUS, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_JOB_APPLICATION.NEXTVAL, #{user_id}, #{posting_id}, #{apply_title}, #{apply_content}, #{resume_file}, 'SUBMITTED', SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM JOB_APPLICATION WHERE USER_ID = #{user_id} ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC
SELECT * FROM JOB_APPLICATION WHERE POSTING_ID = #{posting_id} ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT ja.APPLY_ID, ja.USER_ID, ja.POSTING_ID, ja.APPLY_TITLE, ja.APPLY_CONTENT, ja.RESUME_FILE, ja.APPLY_STATUS, ja.CREATED_AT, ja.UPDATED_AT, jp.TITLE AS postingTitle, u.USER_NAME AS applicantName FROM JOB_APPLICATION ja JOIN JOB_POSTING jp ON ja.POSTING_ID = jp.POSTING_ID JOIN USER_ACCOUNT u ON ja.USER_ID = u.USER_ID WHERE jp.WRITER_ID = #{companyId} ORDER BY ja.CREATED_AT DESC
